violations.text: Dish was observed in hand-washing sink located in 3-bay sink area. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. PIC removed dish from hand washing sink. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the (QT) sanitizing solution for the (3-bay sink). New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2025

The area behind the wall of reach-in freezers was observed to have an accumulation of droppings and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean and to aid in the current pest control program. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2024

The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. A toilet room located on the PREMISES shall be completely enclosed and provided with a tight-fitting and self-closing door. New Violation. Correct By: 05/24/2023
